data.body: STORY F ff6f CLAIMED + TDD RED established. Oracle authored: tests/unit/_audit_page_helpers.py (rich store+plan/completion/code seeding), happy-path test_audit_ticket_page.py [SHARED w/ implementer: /ticket/<id> renders 200 with 3 gate sections + finding text], held-out test_audit_ticket_page_heldout.py (14 tests covering all 9 ACs: gate-strip counts+anchors, fixed section order, 4-pass VALUES, threshold-meter distinct ticks + v1 fallback, decision grouping, convergence bars(<=3)/line(>=4 K-polylines)+SR table, round-selector ?plan_round=n, completion PASS criteria+operator-attested-flag & FAIL fallback, empty-state panels). RED confirmed: all 14 fail with 404 (route absent) — real absence. Both modules importorskip fastapi+httpx (lean CI skips, like reviewbot app tests). Held-out file MOVED to job tmp. Implementer contract: add GET /ticket/<id> to create_app + Jinja2 templates in src/rebar/audit/templates/, consuming audit_trail; group findings[] by decision; DOM markers per spec (conv-bars/conv-bar/conv-line/polyline, gate-strip #anchors, native <details>).
